UFC MMA AI Judge Scorecards

This page lists all AI Judge scorecards generated by my AI Judge bot starting with the ones posted on Twitter by the former @MMAAIJudge account. The model is using XGBoost to the best practices of Kaggle in around 2021 (whatever they were at the time). All attempts made to improve the model over the years have failed miserably.
Note that point deductions are not accounted for in the final scores. If you know of a place that tracks point deductions, I'd love to include them.
